title: Content Security Policy (CSP) header not set - https://mremoteng.org
author: Kvarkas
body_snippet: Aikido security scanner report: CSP header not set on mremoteng.org. CSP is first line of defense against XSS and data injection. Recommendation: configure web server to set Content-Security-Policy header.

iterations.description: Website infrastructure issue (mremoteng.org CSP headers). Not application code — out of scope for this fork. Upstream maintainer (Kvarkas) filed it themselves.

notes: Website security header, not application code. Out of scope for fork.
